blended.narrative: Howelsen Hill is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,819 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.9" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 59".
